proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass extraction from MinerU Table 1; employment equation omission, shock signs, and shifted BGG timing need source review.

unresolved_issues: Employment Phillips curve is visible in the paper table but omitted in the EA_VI16bgg implementation.
Shock process sign conventions were taken from the implementation cross-check and should be checked against the online appendix before reviewed status.
BGG timing is shifted between paper notation and implementation notation; this draft documents the convention but does not prove equivalence.
